# Bennie Joseph

> Salesforce Certified Application Architect and AI agent builder focused on Agentforce, Apex, LWC, Salesforce integrations, RAG systems, and enterprise AI workflows.

Site: https://benniejoseph.dev
Blog: https://benniejoseph.dev/blog
RSS: https://benniejoseph.dev/blog/rss.xml

## Primary Pages

- [Portfolio](https://benniejoseph.dev): Salesforce architect profile, projects, work history, certifications, and contact details.
- [Signal Log](https://benniejoseph.dev/blog): Practical Salesforce, Agentforce, Apex, LWC, and AI agent engineering articles.

## Recommended Articles

- [SOQL Optimization: The Missing Guide](https://benniejoseph.dev/blog/soql-optimization-the-missing-guide)
- [Prompt Engineering for Salesforce Admins](https://benniejoseph.dev/blog/prompt-engineering-for-salesforce-admins)

- [Agentforce Custom Actions: A Builder Playbook](https://benniejoseph.dev/blog/agentforce-custom-actions-a-builder-playbook)
- [Building AI Agents with OpenAI and Salesforce](https://benniejoseph.dev/blog/building-ai-agents-with-openai-and-salesforce)
- [RAG for Salesforce Orgs: Index Your Knowledge Base](https://benniejoseph.dev/blog/rag-for-salesforce-orgs-index-your-knowledge-base)

## Topics

Salesforce architecture, Agentforce, Apex performance, Lightning Web Components, Salesforce AI, RAG, multi-agent workflows, SOQL optimization, enterprise integrations, nCino, SaaS engineering.
